overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a character walking through a rainy futuristic city at dusk. The character moves along neon-lit sidewalks and crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with luxury storefronts and transit infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk beside a busy street, approaching an overhead transit bridge

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera carrying a red umbrella

entered.detail: tall dark building with illuminated 'BALMAIN' signage on the facade
elevated pedestrian walkway spanning across the street ahead
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk beside a busy street, passing the Balmain building and approaching an overhead pedestrian bridge. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction while futuristic vehicles pass on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath transit overpass with neon storefronts

events.description: entering covered area under overpass with prominent yellow neon lighting from storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking under the overhead transit bridge through an area illuminated by bright yellow neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking past carrying a glowing green umbrella that illuminates the surrounding area

entered.detail: bright yellow illuminated signs and window displays lining the left side of the walkway
large yellow digital advertisement display mounted on a building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive overhead transit bridge where the lighting shifts to artificial yellow neon from storefronts on the left. A pedestrian with a distinctive glowing green umbrella passes by as the character approaches a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with zebra crossing and heavy signage

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with prominent zebra crossing
beginning to cross the street at the zebra crossing while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the intersection among other pedestrians while observing traffic

notable_agents.action: crossing the street carrying a glowing orange umbrella that creates a bright halo effect

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing marked with 'WAIT' text on the asphalt
tall building-mounted screens displaying colorful advertisements and animations

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection with a prominent zebra crossing. The character waits for traffic then crosses the wet street among other pedestrians, including one with a glowing orange umbrella, while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked futuristic sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins by passing the Balmain building beside a busy street, moving toward an overhead pedestrian bridge as futuristic vehicles glide past on the wet road. As the camera moves under the massive transit bridge, the lighting shifts to artificial yellow neon from nearby storefronts, momentarily framing a pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection, where the view opens up to a prominent zebra crossing. Finally, the camera follows the character across the shimmering street among other pedestrians and glowing orange umbrellas while futuristic traffic navigates the crossing.
